name: chrV_holocentromere
description: Holocentric CenH3/HCP-3 distributed loading sites on C. elegans chromosome V. Unlike monocentric chromosomes, C. elegans assembles ~700 small CENP-A (HCP-3) domains along each chromosome (median CenH3 patch ~1.5 kb at ~10-50 kb spacing). HCP-3 nucleosomes are anti-correlated with germline transcription and enriched in chromosome arm domains. There is no monomeric satellite consensus for the holocentromere; each site is a non-tandem chromatin mark rather than a defined sequence repeat. Mapping is treated as standard euchromatin with awareness that broad CenH3 ChIP-seq peaks span the whole chromosome.
expected_copy_count: ~700 discrete HCP-3-loaded sites along the chromosome (sequence-non-specific)
